recent.task: Contact name research complete: 49/181 Airtable prospects now have verified owner first names. Researched via email parsing + 7 browser subagents across all 3 verticals.

Researching contact names for 180 Airtable prospects — scraping websites and parsing email addresses

Built quote intake pipeline: auto-detects quote emails in atlas@ inbox, extracts data from PDFs (pymupdf + Gemini vision), cross-references with Airtable, auto-moves Prospects→Clients and creates Quotes. Wired into inbox pulse
Cross-referenced Phase 2 data with Airtable: 50 updated, 60 new prospects created (30 commercial cleaning + 30 marketing agencies). Airtable now at 181 prospects.
